title: Multifamily Investing
subtitle: From duplexes to 200-unit value-add deals
description: Multifamily is the most-understood CRE asset class — and the most competitive. This course covers small (5-20 unit), mid (20-100 unit), and institutional (100+ unit) multifamily, the unique financing options (agency debt from Fannie/Freddie), value-add strategies, and how to underwrite a deal in any sub-segment.
outcomes: Underwrite a small, mid, and institutional multifamily deal
Access agency debt through Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, and HUD
Execute value-add plays: unit renovations, amenity upgrades, operational efficiency
Understand market rent, LRO, loss-to-lease, and other multifamily-specific metrics
Evaluate Class A, B, C, and D multifamily properties
